title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Following Anthropic, OpenAI files confidentially for IPO

title: Active tokenized RWAs surge almost 600% despite crypto pullback: Binance
summary: Tokenized stocks, gold and real estate are driving broader adoption as banks and institutions embrace blockchain-based assets despite a weaker crypto market.

title: FCC lets Amazon Leo miss deployment deadline with temporary spectrum penalty
summary:
Amazon no longer faces a July 30 cutoff for deploying half its planned 3,232 broadband satellites, but the reprieve comes with a temporary loss of spectrum priority that could give SpaceX and other rivals more leverage in orbit.

title: Morning Minute: Bitcoin Recovers After Fall Below $60k
summary: Crypto rebounded Monday after Friday's selloff, driven by strong jobs data, AI IPO liquidity drain and Saylor worries.

title: Arthur Hayes dumps WLD days after Maelstrom’s AI IPO pitch
summary: Maelstrom’s Arthur Hayes has been on a selling spree recently, offloading positions in HYPE, ZEC, NEAR and now WLD.

title: Bybit to offer tokenized SpaceX IPO access through xStocks
summary: Eligible Bybit users can subscribe to tokenized SpaceX IPO shares through xStocks, a Kraken-linked framework that brings public market offerings to crypto exchanges.

title: Tokenization firm Securitize clears key SEC hurdle for NYSE listing
summary: The firm announced that the US securities regulator has declared its S-4 registration statement effective, bringing it closer to a SPAC merger with Cantor Equity Partners II.

title: Justin Sun’s HTX delists Trump family’s USD1 amid freeze fight
summary: HTX said World Liberty froze its addresses and has responded by delisting and suspending the platform’s token.

title: Frontier AI Models Can Find Crypto's Biggest Bugs. Experts Warn the Industry Isn't Ready
summary: The Zcash vulnerability uncovered with help from Anthropic's Claude Opus 4.8 signals a shift in who may discover critical flaws first.

title: Wall Street Is Coming for Hyperliquid's Perps Crown, Arthur Hayes Says
summary: Arthur Hayes warned that Hyperliquid's core value driver—using trading fees to burn tokens—exposes the protocol to market share losses.

title: Claude Opus 4.8 Review: Better At What’s It Good At, Worse At What It’s Not
summary: Anthropic's new flagship aced our math problem and shipped a spotless game—then drained our entire token quota in a single prompt. We ran it through six tests, and here's how it did.

title: Satellite maker Apex’s valuation rises to $2.3 billion after latest $200 million raise
summary:
Apex has raised more than $200 million to expand in-house satellite production capabilities, announcing a funding round June 5 it says nearly doubled the four-year-old manufacturer’s valuation to $2.3 billion.
